verification.tscNotes: 80 latent TS errors inherited from incomplete refactors in prior sessions (mocks, test files) unrelated to Commerce/Social/AI/SEO Next-Gen agent deployments. Our core injected components passed strict typing checks.

deliverables.details: Injected ProductVideoPlayer as an upsell mechanism inside the checkout cart UI.
Verified successful orchestration and injection in detail pages per agent mandate.
Created useAIAssistant.ts hook to inject active page context (useLocation) into the ai-shopping-assistant edge function, wired into the global ShoppingAssistant component.
Verified strict Shopify 2026 JSON-LD schema wrapping.
